title: Zorua Spiral Universe Season 3
description: Zorua Spiral Universe Season 3 is a modpack designed for the ZSU friendgroup, uploaded to allow for easy updating and adding of mods for everyone.
body:
The Zorua Spiral Universe Modpack provides multiple mods that enhance the worldbuilding through structures, adds plenty of ores to give the players tons of customization through Tinker's Construct, and plenty of Create addons to help you automate whatever items you want. This project will get updated as time goes on to add more content to keep players on their toes and continually give them more customization options.

Current Version: ZSU v3.0.1
